name: Kitty Litter Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 box German Chocolate or Spice Cake mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the cake mixes according to package directions. Bake them in any shape pan, as they will be broken up later.
2. Prepare the pudding mix according to package directions and refrigerate until well chilled.
3. Put the cookies into a food processor with the filling and pulse until the cookies are crushed. Scrape the sides of the processor bowl often to prevent sticking.
4. To 1 cup of cookie crumbs, add a few drops of green food coloring for the chlorophyll effect. Mix well in a jar.
5. When the cakes are cooled, crumble them into a large bowl and mix with half of the remaining (uncolored) cookie crumbs and enough chilled pudding to make the mixture moist but not soggy.
6. Line the kitty litter box with the new liner and add the cake/pudding mixture, spreading it out evenly.
7. Unwrap 3 Tootsie Rolls and heat in the microwave until soft and pliable, but not melted. Shape blunt ends into slightly curved points. Repeat with 3 more Tootsie Rolls and bury them in the cake mixture at random intervals.
8. Sprinkle remaining white cookie crumbs over the top of the mixture, then scatter green crumbs lightly on top.
9. Heat the remaining 6 Tootsie Rolls in the microwave until almost melted, scrape them over the top, and sprinkle with crumbs from the box.
10. Place the kitty litter box on two sheets of newspaper and serve with the pooper scooper.
